neighborhoods.name: Downtown Lapeer
neighborhoods.description: Small county seat with courthouse square, local shops, and community events
neighborhoods.character: Small-town county seat, courthouse square, local

housing.predominantType: Victorian houses, small apartments, and older homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Lapeer. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Metamora / Hadley
neighborhoods.description: Rural townships with horse country character, hunt clubs, and scenic countryside
neighborhoods.character: Horse country, rural scenic, hunt club

housing.predominantType: Farm houses, country homes, and equestrian properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Lapeer's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Imlay City / Dryden
neighborhoods.description: Smaller surrounding communities with very affordable housing and agricultural character
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Goodrich / Ortonville
neighborhoods.description: Southern township communities with lake access, good schools, and family amenities
neighborhoods.character: Lake access, good schools, family community
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
